elements.original_description: A person sits slumped on a stool, head down, with a large thought bubble above them showing a mountain labeled 'IMPOSSIBLE' with a red 'X' over it. The person wears casual clothes and has a defeated expression. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a person with a defeated expression, slumped on a stool with head down, wearing casual clothes. A large thought bubble is visible above them, containing a mountain labeled 'IMPOSSIBLE' with a bold red 'X' over it. Cinematic lighting with soft shadows, muted color palette, sharp focus on the person and thought bubble, emotionally resonant and somber mood, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks, high resolution, photorealistic detail.
